code: import axios from"axios";const TOKEN_KEY="medcompare_token";const SIGNUP_FLAG_KEY="medcompare_signup_complete";export const getAuthToken=()=>localStorage.getItem(TOKEN_KEY);export const isSignupComplete=()=>localStorage.getItem(SIGNUP_FLAG_KEY)==="true";export const setAuthToken=token=>{localStorage.setItem(TOKEN_KEY,token);};export const setSignupComplete=()=>{localStorage.setItem(SIGNUP_FLAG_KEY,"true");};export const clearSignupComplete=()=>{localStorage.removeItem(SIGNUP_FLAG_KEY);};export const clearAuthToken=()=>{localStorage.removeItem(TOKEN_KEY);};export const api=axios.create({baseURL:process.env.REACT_APP_API_BASE_URL||"http://127.0.0.1:8000/api"});api.interceptors.request.use(config=>{const token=getAuthToken();if(token){config.headers.Authorization=`Token ${token}`;}return config;});
